title: Improved high-throughput quantification of luminescent microplate assays using a common Western-blot imaging system
author: Hawkins, Storey

steps.title: Total soluble protein extraction
steps.instruction: A mortar and pestle was pre-cooled with liquid N2, and skeletal muscle samples were weighed, crushed, and then homogenized 1:2 w/v in pre-chilled homogenization buffer (20 mM HEPES, 200 mM NaCl, 0.1 mM EDTA, 10 mM NaF, 1 mM Na3VO4, 10 mM, 10 mM β-glycerophosphate, 1 μL/mL protease inhibitor [BioShop Canada Inc., Catalogue #PIC002], and a few crystals of PMSF, pH 7.4). The homogenates were centrifuged at 4 °C at 10,000 × g for 15 min. The supernatant was collected, and protein concentration was determined using the BioRad protein assay (BioRad Laboratories, Catalogue #5000002). Sample concentrations were adjusted to 5 μg/μL using the above homogenization buffer. Samples were then stored at −80 °C until use.
